title: Authority v1
description: Authority audit block (RD-006): the role/phase-scoped allowlist verdict attached to a routing decision at metadata.authority. Present iff the authority feature is enabled. See rationale.md and docs/2026-07-12-authority-split-design.md. The definitions.authority_context object is the wire input accepted at constraints.authority_context.

policy_sha.description: sha256 of the loaded authority policy file — audit provenance; a decision can be reproduced against the exact policy that made it.

role.description: Agent-run role from the request context; null when the request carried no authority_context.

phase.description: Coarse lifecycle phase from the request context; null when the request carried no authority_context.

denied.description: Capability-eligible candidates the allowlist rejected, with reasons. Empty when everyone eligible was authorized.

authority_context.description: Wire input at constraints.authority_context. Execution context, NOT a task feature: it must never enter the 22-dim feature vector or DT training semantics.
